principles.statement: Source vault files are canonical; runtime state is rebuildable.
principles.rationale: Mega Vault Viewer must never become a hidden second source of truth.
principles.enforcement: Tests assert runtime state stays outside the vault and CAS/media rendering avoids duplicate preview payloads.

principles.statement: JSONL-vault daily notes live at daily/YYYY-MM-DD.md and CAS blobs at blobs/sha256/<first2>/<hash>.
principles.rationale: The viewer must match the actual Life OS/jsonl-vault shape instead of old 10_notes conventions.
principles.enforcement: Runtime flow tests assert daily detection and CAS rendering from those paths.

principles.statement: The app shell separates navigation scroll from document scroll and avoids redundant title/status chrome.
principles.rationale: Large notes and large vault sidebars must remain usable without the whole app scrolling as one slab.
principles.enforcement: CSS layout uses fixed-height grid regions and independent overflow containers.

principles.statement: Project workflow state lives in .go/ next to code.
principles.rationale: A fresh clone should explain current direction and next work without chat memory.
